title: ARprod's Delight
description: The power of Create and Farmer's Delight, combined!
body:
This mod seeks to fill in the gaps of Farmer's Delight with the power of Create, terrible programming, and a Caucassian essence sprinkled throughout.

Here's some of its biggest features:

**Frying Basket**

![a Frying Basket placed in a Basin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d74b2bb315a4138bf0395ae7a17c1d1643d5e9ab.png)

The frying basket opens up a new way to process food; as it name suggests, _**Deep Frying**_ !
Place it in a Basin and heat it up with a Blaze Burner if needed and you're _frying away_ ! (🤓)

**Tonir**

![a Tonir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566b065106b213959ace16abbd2d89b3afeddddd.png)

The Tonir (aka Tandoor) is a vertical oven used to make Lavash bread or cook meat. 

**Various building and storage blocks**

![Some blocks placed in a pyramid pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89f244dcf1da914e9db3457adb764f59618c0442.png)

The mod also includes a variety of blocks to use when building or to save space in your chests.

Check out the gallery to see more of the mod's features!

_Older versions are available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arprods-delight)_
